title: Its still here HORROR
description: The overworld has changed,with multiple entities haunting this world, now you must survive this wretched world of Herobrine, the knocker, midnight lurker, and other horror entity's lurking in this overworld. be careful and watch  for the faces
body:
this modpack is full of just horror and ARG-like stuff. like how I found a lot of mods to recreate old Minecraft to give it the ARG look and the broken script look. the modpack adds Herobrine the from the fog version, also includes the Midnight Lurker and the face of horror. there are lots of other entities.

if you don't see the old textures, look in the resource pack area that is where you enable the textures.

if you experience any bugs go to the link that gives the Discord. if you also, for some reason, experience lag, turn down your render distance
